hero_desc: Turkey's first inter-company sailing race | 3 days, 16 teams, pure competition
intro_title: Take Your Place in the Inter-Company Sailing Cup
intro_desc: Join this 3-day sailing race designed for companies. Compete with your team, meet your competitors, and enjoy an unforgettable experience.
about_desc:
You don't need to know how to sail. Each team gets an experienced helmsman.
*Helmsman: A licensed sailor who controls the boat and guides the team during the race.
about_feat1_desc: A medical team, DJ, live broadcast, and catering are with you all day.
about_feat2_desc: You race on a course overlooking the Gulf of Izmir, right in the middle of the Aegean.
step1_desc: Register your company and team easily. We will contact you within 12 hours.
step2_desc: Race rules and course information will be sent to all teams 1 week before the race.
step3_desc: A total of 36 races are held over 3 days. Each race lasts 20-30 minutes.
step4_desc: On Sunday at 4:00 PM, finish the race with an award ceremony and celebration event.
race_desc: You can find the schedule and details of the exciting races below.
race_day1_desc: We start the first day with warm-up races and a basic training course. Build your team and get ready!
race_day2_desc: An unforgettable adventure in nature awaits you on the intermediate course, where strategy and speed are most important.
race_day3_desc: The grand final race! Show your skills and win the prize in this race with all teams participating.
facility_title: The Area Where the Sailing Race Will Take Place
facility_desc: Our modern venue offers athletes a unique experience with courses specially designed for professional sailing races, accommodation areas, and social facilities. We are in the heart of nature, where the wind is most ideal.
early_title: Don't Miss the 2026 Season Sailing Race
pkg_title: Choose the Best Race Package for You
pkg1_title: Build Your Team and Enter the Race
pkg1_desc: Each team has 3 people. You can send more than one team from your company.
pkg2_title: Let's Customize the Race for Your Company
pkg2_desc: Let's organize the race completely for your company. 16 teams, 3 days, full corporate experience. Snacks and DJ included.
footer_desc: The Corporate Sailing Cup is a corporate sailing event where companies compete in teams of 3 people.
footer_copyright: © 2026 Corporate Sailing Cup. All Rights Reserved.
about_story_h2: Sailing Cup is a chance to grow, explore, and create memories that will last a lifetime in a warm and fun environment.
mission_h2: We are catching tomorrow's wind today and going beyond limits
mission_p: Our goal is not only to compete, but also to train a new generation of sailors who understand the spirit of the sea, respect nature, and value teamwork. We design every detail carefully with a sustainable approach to sport.
life_h2: A Fun Day Full of Learning and Friendship
life_p: Every day at sea is a new adventure and a chance to learn. While learning the language of the wind, we not only learn to sail, but also learn to deal with challenges, work as a team, and live in harmony with nature.
team_h2: Those Who Made the Sea and Wind a Way of Life
contact_hero_h1: Get in touch with our friendly camp team.
contact_hero_p: We are here for your questions, booking requests, or just to say hello. Reach out to us to start your sailing adventure. We can't wait to get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_form_title: Fill out the form, and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_form_p: Fill out the form, and our team will get back to you with the necessary support shortly.
contact_cb_terms: I have read and agree to the Terms and Conditions
contact_cb_kvkk: I have read and approve the PDPL Information Text
contact_cb_newsletter: I would like to receive informational emails about the event
loc_h2: See Our Other Sailing Venues on the Map
terms_title: Companies Sailing Cup Terms and Conditions
terms_intro: Welcome to Companies Sailing Cup! By registering for or participating in the Event, you are deemed to have accepted the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.
terms_s1_item1: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern the rights and obligations of all parties regarding participation in the Companies Sailing Cup event ("Event").
terms_s1_item2: By registering for or participating in the Event, you are deemed to have accepted these Terms.
terms_s2_item2: Venue: Gülbahçe Sailing Club, Urla, İzmir
terms_s2_item3: The program, format, and content may be changed by the organizer without prior notice.
terms_s3_item1: Participation is on a corporate team basis; individual registration is not accepted.
terms_s3_item2: Only 1 (one) team per company may participate.
terms_s3_item3: Registration is finalized upon complete submission of the application form and payment of the participation fee.
terms_s3_item4: No spot will be reserved until the registration process is complete.
terms_s3_item5: All participants are required to register with the Turkish Sailing Federation training program. This registration is coordinated by the organizer.
terms_s3_item6: The organizer reserves the right to reject any application without providing a reason.
terms_s4_item1: The participation fee is specified at the time of registration.
terms_s4_item2: 20% VAT will be added to all prices.
terms_s4_item3: Payment must be made via the designated method by the payment deadline.
terms_s4_item4: Registration is not finalized until payment is complete.
terms_s5_item1: Cancellation requests must be submitted in writing (via email) to the organizer.
terms_s5_item2: The organizer will communicate cancellation conditions and refund rates separately at the time of registration.
terms_s5_item3: Team member changes must be communicated in writing prior to the event.
terms_s5_item4: In the event of cancellation by the organizer, the full participation fee collected will be refunded. The organizer bears no additional liability in such cases.
terms_s6_item1: Sailing is a physically demanding sport that carries inherent risks in open water.
terms_s6_item2: Participants acknowledge that they are aware of these risks throughout the event.
terms_s6_item3: The organizer cannot be held responsible for any injuries, material damage, loss, or accidents that may occur during the race or within the event area.
terms_s6_item4: The organizer is not responsible for any program changes due to weather conditions or force majeure.
terms_s7_item1: All participants registered with the Turkish Sailing Federation training program are covered under the federation's insurance throughout the event.
terms_s7_item2: Detailed information regarding insurance coverage may be requested from the federation.
terms_s7_item3: Participant companies may consider obtaining additional insurance against risks not covered by the federation's policy.
terms_s8_item1: All participants are required to comply with the rules of Gülbahçe Sailing Club.
terms_s8_item2: Compliance with the race regulations set by the organizer is mandatory.
terms_s8_item3: Teams acting in violation of the rules may be disqualified or removed from the event. Participation fees will not be refunded in such cases.
terms_s8_item4: Alcohol consumption is permitted only in designated areas and within legal limits.
terms_s9_item1: Photographs and videos taken during the event may be used by the organizer for promotional purposes.
terms_s9_item2: Logos of participating companies may be used in event communication materials.
terms_s9_item3: Participants who object to such use must notify the organizer in writing before the event begins.
terms_s10_item1: Personal data collected during the registration process is used solely for event organization purposes and is not shared with third parties.
terms_s10_item2: For more information, please review our Privacy Policy page.
terms_s11_item1: In the event of natural disasters, epidemics, official bans, extreme weather conditions, or circumstances beyond the organizer's control, the event may be postponed or cancelled.
terms_s11_item2: In such cases, the organizer will make every effort to provide refunds, but no additional compensation obligation arises.
terms_s12_item1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey.
terms_s12_item2: The courts and enforcement offices of İzmir shall have jurisdiction over any disputes.
terms_s13_item1: The organizer reserves the right to amend these Terms with prior notice.
terms_s13_item2: The current version will always be published on the official website.
terms_contact_desc: If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms and Conditions, please get in touch with us:
privacy_intro: Your privacy matters to us. This Privacy Policy explains how personal data collected during the Companies Sailing Cup registration and participation process is processed, stored, and protected.
privacy_s1_desc1: This Privacy Policy explains how personal data collected by Urla Girişim Summit ("Organizer") during the Companies Sailing Cup ("Event") registration and participation process is processed, stored, and protected.
privacy_s1_desc2: By completing the registration form, you are deemed to have read and understood this Policy.

privacy_s6_desc: Your personal data will be retained for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was processed and in accordance with the retention periods prescribed by applicable legislation. Upon expiry of the retention period, data will be deleted, destroyed, or anonymized.
privacy_s7_desc: Photographs and videos taken during the event may be used by the Organizer on the website, social media channels, and promotional materials. Participants who do not consent to such use must notify the Organizer in writing before the event begins at
privacy_s8_desc: The Organizer takes reasonable technical and administrative measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure. All service providers that process personal data are required to maintain equivalent security standards.

kvkk_title: Disclosure Notice Under Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data
kvkk_intro: Your personal data is processed by Urla Girişim Summit in its capacity as data controller, within the scope described below.
kvkk_s1_desc: Your personal data is processed by Urla Girişim Summit in its capacity as data controller, within the scope described below.

kvkk_s3_item3: Handling enrollment for the Turkish Sailing Federation training program
kvkk_s3_item6: Using photographs and videos for promotional and marketing activities (subject to your explicit consent)
kvkk_s4_item1: Article 5/2(c): Establishment and performance of a contract (registration)
kvkk_s4_item2: Article 5/2(ç): Compliance with a legal obligation
kvkk_s4_item3: Article 5/2(f): Legitimate interest of the data controller
kvkk_s4_item4: Article 5/1: Explicit consent (use of photographs/videos and marketing communications)

kvkk_s5_item3: Event service providers — catering, photography, logistics (under confidentiality agreements)

kvkk_s6_desc: Your personal data will be retained for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was processed, and in accordance with the retention periods prescribed by applicable legislation. Upon expiry of the retention period, data will be deleted, destroyed, or anonymized.
kvkk_s7_title: 7. Your Rights Under Article 11 of the PDPL
kvkk_s7_item1: To learn whether your personal data is being processed
kvkk_s7_item2: To request information if it has been processed
kvkk_s7_item3: To learn the purpose of processing and whether it is being used accordingly
kvkk_s7_item4: To know the third parties to whom data has been transferred, domestically or abroad
kvkk_s7_item5: To request correction of incomplete or inaccurately processed data
kvkk_s7_item6: To request deletion or destruction of data within the framework of Article 7 of the PDPL
kvkk_s7_item7: To request that corrections, deletions, or destructions be notified to third parties to whom data has been transferred
kvkk_s7_item8: To object to outcomes arising solely from automated processing of your data that produce results against your interests
kvkk_s7_item9: To claim compensation for damages incurred due to unlawful processing of your data
kvkk_s8_desc: To exercise the rights listed above, you may submit a written request to
kvkk_s8_desc2: Requests will be concluded within 30 days at the latest, depending on the nature of the inquiry.
